plan_review_notes: Approved focused replay scope: evaluation-only harness executor, bounded Sisyphus-backed isolated evaluation path, and targeted evolution tests. Explicitly excludes production follow-up bridge, promotion/invalidation, and CLI/MCP ingress.

plan_review_history.notes: Approved focused replay scope: evaluation-only harness executor, bounded Sisyphus-backed isolated evaluation path, and targeted evolution tests. Explicitly excludes production follow-up bridge, promotion/invalidation, and CLI/MCP ingress.

spec_review_notes: Frozen spec anchors the evaluation-only harness executor replay on main. Live repo/task-state mutation remains out of scope; only isolated evaluation evidence capture and deterministic summary fallback are permitted in this slice.

normal_cases.name: `execute_evolution_harness(...)` can populate completed baseline/candidate metrics through the summary fallback path.
A bounded Sisyphus-backed evaluation request can return captured evidence and completed evaluation status.

edge_cases.name: Narrowed candidate target scope preserves run-order semantics while still executing through the harness.
Optional orchestrator integration, if added, keeps the existing read-only default behavior stable.

exception_cases.name: Failed evaluation executors surface actionable failure metadata and do not mutate repository files.
Sisyphus-backed evaluation launch failures keep evidence when available and mark the evaluation as failed rather than silently succeeding.
